🏆 High-Elo Ace Winner Playbook v10

NARRATIVE Each turn: YOUR PLAY · YOUR SWING · OPP DEPLOYS · OPP THREATS (enumerated swing-by-swing with per-attack defense rec) · DEFENSE PLAN. Whitebeard event turns highlighted.
Sample: 18,075 OP15-era ranked replays (2026-W12+, mode 0). Kept 1573 games where Ace WON and Elo ≥ 2400.

☀️ vs Yellow Luffy MD OP15-098
